items.title: Nor'easter to march up the East Coast, bringing significant snow
items.description: A significant nor’easter is expected to march up the East Coast on Sunday into Monday, bringing significant snow for the I-95 corridor.

items.title: WATCH:  Baby giraffe and ostrich face off in 'staring contest'
items.description: Rahisi, a young giraffe, engaged in a “staring contest” with an ostrich in a neighboring habitat at the Memphis Zoo.

items.title: WATCH:  Combating social media in the 'brain rot' era
items.description: ABC News’ Will Ganss looks at new ways to curb our cellphone obsession and cut down on screen time.

items.title: US captures record 11th gold medal at the Winter Olympics
